apps.title: My Garden Tale
apps.summary:
"My Garden Tale is a casual simulation and social game where you can grow hundreds of flowers, enjoy the joy of cultivation, create elegant floral arrangements, and decorate your very own garden haven with themed designs.

Game Features:
〓Floral Wonderland〓
Step into the role of a professional gardener with your own plot of land. Hundreds of uniquely styled flowers await your care—from fiery red roses to fresh daisies and elegant tulips, each with its own growth cycle and needs.

〓Artful Flower Arranging〓
Once you’ve harvested vibrant blooms, unleash your creativity through the art of flower arranging. Choose vases, freely combine flowers, and create stunning pieces to showcase or sell for a fulfilling sense of achievement.

〓Lively Flower Fair〓
Want to profit from your garden? Take on daily custom floral orders, resident requests, silk deliveries, and team tasks. Complete them to earn gold and experience, and manage your operations well to avoid cancellations and boost sales!

〓A Blooming Encounter〓
Make friends and form guilds for fun social interactions. Visit friends’ gardens, “borrow” flowers in joyful flower-snatching battles, and compete in guild events to win rich rewards.

〓Cozy Pet Courtyard〓
In your private “Orange Meow Courtyard,” cuddle, feed, and play with your furry companion for a healing experience. Your pet can even explore and bring back resources. Customize their space with a wide variety of furniture—some of which grant attribute bonuses.

〓Glamorous Dress Up〓
Unlock a variety of exquisite outfits and accessories. Mix, match, and design personalized makeup to express your unique style."

apps.title: Hatch Dragons
apps.summary:
Discover Dragons like you’ve never seen before! Collect and care for hundreds of unique Dragons, uncovering their origins as they grow. From playful Cat Dragons to rare Bluebell Dragons, every new Dragon you hatch and raise brings this cozy, peaceful world to life.

Long ago, Dragons filled this enchanted forest, thriving alongside nature. Each evolved into forms as diverse as the surrounding flora and fauna. Some shimmered with glittering scales, others were soft and furry, and some even bloomed with flowers or mushrooms.

When nearby mining drove the Dragons away, fog crept in and the forest fell silent for years. Now, join Liv the Elf to lift the fog, summon the Dragons home, and help the forest sparkle with life once more.

GAME HIGHLIGHTS
✨ Summon Dragons: Help Liv mix elements, gems, and more to call Dragons of all shapes, forms, and rarities to your forest.
💖 Raise Dragons: Hatch eggs, feed your Dragons, and help them grow into magical, bonded companions.
📖 Collect Hundreds of Dragons: Discover a magical array of Dragons that evolved alongside nature.
🔮 Uncover Lore: Reveal charming legends and little-known facts about your Dragons.
🌲 Explore and Restore: Clear the fog and help the forest awaken with life, magic, and folkloric friends.
🍄 Decorate Your Forest: Adorn your forest with plants and decor that possess magical abilities to help you progress.
🎁 Missions and Events: Missions, updates, and limited-time events bring exciting new Dragons, décor, and rewards. There’s always something new to discover!

If you love Dragons, cozy collection games, and relaxing adventures, you will be enchanted by Hatch Dragons.

*****
Hatch Dragons is developed and published by Runaway.
This game is free to play but does contain in-app purchases. If you run into any issues while playing or you have any suggestions, please reach out to us at support@runaway.zendesk.com

apps.title: Sandy Jam
apps.summary:
🌊Tap, guide, and unwind with flowing sand.

Dive into a calming puzzle experience where every tap controls the movement of colorful sand. Send containers along a moving belt, gather grains by color, and watch images slowly appear as the sand cascades with smooth, lifelike physics. Easy to start, satisfying to master — each level delivers a relaxing yet engaging challenge.

✨Enjoy the soothing visuals of falling sand, responsive tap mechanics, and progressively evolving gameplay. Whether you’re looking to relax your mind or perfect your timing and strategy, this experience blends mindful play with rewarding puzzle progression.

🎮Features
- Intuitive tap-based sand collection mechanics
- Conveyor-style movement and timing gameplay
- Match sand colors to reveal vibrant artworks
- Smooth, realistic physics simulation
- Increasing difficulty with new obstacles
- Polished animations and calming atmosphere
- Dozens of unique pictures to uncover
- Relaxing and addictive gameplay suitable for everyone

apps.title: Cozy Ropes: Relaxing Knitting
apps.summary:
CONNECT THE DOTS: KNITTING EDITION
When life’s got you down and you’re feeling stressed out, what better way to make things right than to reach for your favorite cozy relaxing knitting puzzle and partake in a few puzzle solving game levels? Cozy Ropes is a satisfying ASMR game where you connect dots with rope to form colors and shapes that will come together and reveal a hidden puzzle. Your mood is sure to lighten as you make your way from dot to dot in this cheerful puzzle solving game!

COLORS AND SHAPES AND PUZZLES, OH MY!
Each level consists of a hidden puzzle, your job is to connect the dots based on how many pieces of rope you need, thus forming colorful geometric shapes that soon reveal the picture within. This satisfying logic puzzle is heavy on the relaxation aspect, so take your time trying various combos with no penalties.

Get ready for:
- Satisfying ASMR gameplay– if you’re a fan of fun noises and haptic effects you’ll love this logic puzzle! For those who just want to connect dots peacefully feel free to just toggle on the music, or even play in total silence.
- Cozy knitting vibes – all of the puzzles have fun crafting vibes, so if you’re a fan of any of the fiber arts this satisfying game is sure to please. Enjoy all of the fun of creating, with none of the mess or need to purchase supplies.
- Your ticket to relaxation – this cozy relaxing puzzle game was specifically designed to help you destress, which means no timers, no crazy graphics or rules, and no punishments for mistakes. Take as long as you need to figure out which dots to connect and step away whenever you need to, with the knowledge that your puzzle will be calmly waiting right where you left it when you come back.
- Adorable graphics – no relaxing knitting game is complete without the cutest graphics, so we made sure levels are chock full of calming but bright colors and pictures to set the mood. Plus solving the puzzles is super straightforward and there aren’t any distracting elements that might otherwise kill the vibe.

THE COZY RELAXING KNITTING PUZZLE OF YOUR DREAMS
Cozy Ropes is your ticket happiness, so why not download it today and let the fun begin! Connect the rope from dot to dot to form shapes and colors then reveal beautiful pictures and make the most of the chill graphics and mood in this satisfying ASMR game. The levels in this logic puzzle are just stimulating enough to keep your brain focused while also giving you a moment to pause and take a deep breath, so hop on in to this cozy relaxing puzzle for some dot connecting and cozy knitting goodness.

When life’s got you down and you’re feeling stressed out, what better way to make things right than to reach for your favorite cozy relaxing knitting puzzle and partake in a few puzzle solving game levels? Cozy Ropes is a satisfying ASMR game where you connect dots with rope to form colors and shapes that will come together and reveal a hidden puzzle. Your mood is sure to lighten as you make your way from dot to dot in this cheerful puzzle solving game!

COLORS AND SHAPES AND PUZZLES, OH MY!                      
Each level consists of a hidden puzzle, your job is to connect the dots based on how many pieces of rope you need, thus forming colorful geometric shapes that soon reveal the picture within. This satisfying logic puzzle is heavy on the relaxation aspect, so take your time trying various combos with no penalties. 

Get ready for:
- Satisfying ASMR gameplay– if you’re a fan of fun noises and haptic effects you’ll love this logic puzzle! For those who just want to connect dots peacefully feel free to just toggle on the music, or even play in total silence.
- Cozy knitting vibes – all of the puzzles have fun crafting vibes, so if you’re a fan of any of the fiber arts this satisfying game is sure to please. Enjoy all of the fun of creating, with none of the mess or need to purchase supplies.
- Your ticket to relaxation – this cozy relaxing puzzle game was specifically designed to help you destress, which means no timers, no crazy graphics or rules, and no punishments for mistakes. Take as long as you need to figure out which dots to connect and step away whenever you need to, with the knowledge that your puzzle will be calmly waiting right where you left it when you come back.
- Adorable graphics – no relaxing knitting game is complete without the cutest graphics, so we made sure levels are chock full of calming but bright colors and pictures to set the mood. Plus solving the puzzles is super straightforward and there aren’t any distracting elements that might otherwise kill the vibe.

THE COZY RELAXING KNITTING PUZZLE OF YOUR DREAMS
Cozy Ropes is your ticket happiness, so why not download it today and let the fun begin! Connect the rope from dot to dot to form shapes and colors then reveal beautiful pictures and make the most of the chill graphics and mood in this satisfying ASMR game. The levels in this logic puzzle are just stimulating enough to keep your brain focused while also giving you a moment to pause and take a deep breath, so hop on in to this cozy relaxing puzzle for some dot connecting and cozy knitting goodness.

apps.title: NYT Crossplay: Play and Spell
apps.summary:
Play with friends, compete and connect in Crossplay, the first 2-player word game from NYT Games that blends socializing and strategy. Play distraction-free and build words with letter tiles. Use built-in tools to learn, improve and win, or simply enjoy the challenge of this multiplayer game.

App Features:

PLAY
• Take turns placing letter tiles on a shared word game board.
• Build words and rack up points with easy-to-play, focused gameplay.
• No in-app ads. Focus on your word game strategy.

CONNECT
• Easily play word games with friends and family.
• Share strategies and friendly banter with in-game chats.
• Grab your letter tiles and go word-to-word in this multiplayer game.

COMPETE
• Start a friendly competition and climb the leaderboard.
• Play multiple word games against friends or random opponents simultaneously.
• Get matched up with equal opponents.

IMPROVE
• Get tips from Cross Bot after every 2-player game.
• Spell and sharpen your word game skills against the computer.

LEARN
• Expand your vocabulary with the word of the day and a built-in dictionary.
• Check your game history and review your thewords you made on the game board.

STATS
• Track your progress and lifetime stats, including wins and losses, average scores, longest words and more.

BY DOWNLOADING THE NEW YORK TIMES CROSSPLAY APP, you agree to:
• The New York Times Privacy Policy: https://www.nytimes.com/privacy/privacy-policy
• The New York Times Cookie Policy: https://www.nytimes.com/privacy/cookie-policy

apps.title: BALL x PIT
apps.summary:
BALL x PIT is a brick-breaking, ball-fusing, base-building survival roguelite. Batter hordes of enemies with ricocheting balls and gather the riches of the pit to expand your homestead, generate resources and recruit unique heroes.

BALL x PIT is a fast-paced fantasy roguelite where heroes must find the balls to plunge deeper into a seemingly bottomless pit of monsters. Develop arcane ammunition and resources in pursuit of treasure, recruiting additional heroes to aid you in your perilous quest.

Ballbylon has fallen. After a meteoric and completely unexpected event annihilated the great city, all that remains is an ominous, yawning pit. Treasure hunters from far and wide flock to the city’s tomb to seek their fortune, plumbing the depths in search of Ballbylon’s scattered riches. Few return.

The pit plays host to armies of barbaric creatures, hellbent on ending your quest before it even begins. Armed with a growing arsenal of magic-infused projectiles, batter your way through multiple levels of increasingly challenging obstacles to claim the ultimate prizes and rebuild New Ballbylon.

Fuse Your Balls
The Ball Fusion system encourages explosive experimentation with over 60 randomized balls to equip and combine during your journey. Discover overpowered combinations and unexpected synergies from hundreds of possible outcomes.

Build New Ballbylon
Expand New Ballbylon with over 70 unique buildings that provide gameplay bonuses and unlock further power-ups, new characters, and more! As your community grows, task homebound heroes with automated tasks to keep the resources coming while you dive deeper into the pit.

Discover New Realms
Face legions of diverse enemies within the pit, battling through barren deserts, frozen caverns, savage forests and more. Each region offers its own unique set of hazards on top of hordes of increasingly challenging foes and mighty, screen-filling bosses.

Recruit Fellow Hunters
As you explore the pit you’ll encounter fellow treasure hunters eager to add their skills to your expedition. Each character has unique, upgradable mechanics that totally change the way you play the game. Experimentation and adaptation are crucial to the success of New Ballbylon!

apps.title: Baseball Hits 26
apps.summary:
Baseball Hits 26 is an officially licensed MLB Players, Inc. Game.

⚾PLAY WITH MLBPI SUPERSTARS. ANYTIME, ANYWHERE.
Enter the ballpark, step up to the plate, and experience the thrill of real baseball, officially licensed by MLB Players, Inc. Collect and play with today’s biggest baseball superstars in an easy-to-learn, deeply satisfying mobile baseball game built for fans.

🎮EASY TO PLAY. HARD TO PUT DOWN.
Tap to swing, time it right, and send it deep. Every pitch, hit, and home run feels authentic with lifelike motion-captured animation, realistic baseball physics, and stats based on real-life MLBPI superstars. Whether you’re chasing a clutch hit, the intensity of 9 innings, throwing strikes in Pitching Ace, or crushing moonshots in Homerun King, every swing and pitch delivers that big-league adrenaline.

🧢BUILD YOUR DREAM LINEUP WITH OFFICIAL MLBPI PLAYERS
Recruit and upgrade over 800 official MLBPI baseball superstars! Featuring cover athlete Cal Raleigh, the switch-hitting home run force, alongside five-tool dynamo José Ramírez, generational slugger Juan Soto, power pitcher strikeout ace Tarik Skubal, lightning-fast playmaker Corbin Carroll, and run-producing masher Vladimir Guerrero Jr.

Mix current MLBPI legends with top-ranked rising stars like Jackson Holliday, power-hitting breakout talents like Junior Caminero, and postseason breakout arms like Trey Yesavage to craft the ultimate roster. Level them up, and climb through competitive tiers to prove your lineup belongs among the elite.

🏆COMPETE AND WIN TOGETHER
Join a Club to connect with other fans, chat, and compete through live events and tournaments. Work as a team to earn rewards, climb leaderboards, and rule the diamond. Every win counts, and clubs win bigger together, so go ahead and beat your baseball rivals.

SHORT SESSIONS. BIG MOMENTS.
Designed for mobile, Baseball Hits 26 fits perfectly into your day. Play a quick inning on break or battle through all 9 innings in a full playoff run at night! The pace is fast, the action believable, and every at-bat matters. Play your way:
⚾Hits Mode: Step into the batter's box and lead your team to victory
🔥Pitching Ace: Aim, release, and fool batters with perfect timing
💥Total Baseball: Hit and pitch for the full baseball experience
👑Homerun King: Pure power-hitting fun with streak bonuses
🏆Events & Tournaments: Time-limited challenges with exclusive rewards!

BEAT YOUR BASEBALL RIVALS. CLIMB THE RANKS. BUILD YOUR LEGACY.
Rise from rookie to legend as you progress through tiers, unlock powerful baseball superstars, and chase special edition stars that celebrate the best in the game. Earn reward boxes, collect currency, and keep improving season after season.

A LIVING BASEBALL WORLD WITH OFFICIAL MLBPI PLAYERS
With ongoing live events, player drops, and new content year-round, Baseball Hits 26 is more than a baseball game; it’s your home for authentic baseball action on mobile. Every update brings new challenges, new baseball stars, and new reasons to play.

KEY FEATURES:
⚾Officially licensed by MLB Players, Inc. Real players and real stats
☝️Simple tap-to-swing and tap-to-pitch gameplay
💥Authentic baseball physics and motion-captured animations
📈Deep roster-building and player progression
🏆Clubs, leaderboards, and live competitions
💎Free-to-play with optional in-app purchases

Baseball Hits 26 is EASY to play, FUN to master, and BUILT FOR BASEBALL FANS.⚾

JOIN THE CLUBHOUSE!
Get the latest news and celebrate big wins on our official Baseball Hits 26 Discord. We’d love your feedback as we continue to build the most fun, authentic baseball experience on mobile

apps.title: Cold War Z RPG
apps.summary:
Cold War Z RPG is a post-apocalyptic idle RPG battler set in a brutal world after the Cold War collapsed into chaos.
Zombies roam the land, mutants hunt in the shadows, and survivors fight each other for resources. Your path, your choices, and your morality define who you become.

☢️ CHOOSE YOUR PATH

Travel through dangerous locations by choosing your route.
Each path leads to different encounters:

Zombie hordes

Mutants and elite enemies

Other survivors — friend or foe

Hidden chests and rare loot

⚖️ MORAL CHOICES MATTER

Meet survivors on your journey and decide their fate:

Help them and gain allies

Kill them and loot their gear

Trade items or deceive them

Your decisions affect progression, rewards, and the world around you.

🧠 IDLE BATTLE SYSTEM

Progress even when you’re offline

Automatic combat with strategic ability usage

Activate powerful skills at key moments

Perfect for both active and idle playstyles

🗡️ DEEP RPG PROGRESSION

Massive item system with rarity tiers

Weapons, armor, and artifacts with multiple stats

Build your character your way: damage, defense, crits, survival

Optimize builds for bosses, PvE, and long runs

👹 BOSSES & ENEMIES

Fight against:

Zombies and mutated horrors

Hostile survivors

Powerful bosses guarding valuable rewards

Each enemy type requires a different approach.

🎒 LOOT, TRADE & SURVIVE

Open chests and discover rare items

Trade with NPCs

Manage inventory and optimize stats

Risk everything for better rewards

🌍 FEATURES

✔ Idle RPG with active abilities
✔ Moral choice system
✔ Multiple enemy factions
✔ Deep loot & stat system
✔ Boss fights
✔ Offline progression
✔ Dark post-apocalyptic atmosphere

Survive the ruins of a world destroyed by fear, power, and war.
In Cold War Z RPG, every step forward is a risk — and every choice has a price.
